evidence.scientific_clarity: Scatter + OLS line + annotated slope/intercept/R²=0.877 clearly conveys Chinchilla-style power-law scaling; OursModel point distinctly highlighted.
evidence.typography: pdf.fonttype=42 and svg.fonttype='none' set globally; font stack starts with Arial/Helvetica before DejaVu Sans fallback; all text sizes specified (8–9 pt).
evidence.palette: Colorblind-safe palette (blue #B4C0E4/#0F4D92 for scatter/fit, #D55E00 orange for OursModel — avoids red/green); categorical vs. directional discipline maintained.
evidence.layout_density: 6×4 inch figure with tight_layout + bbox_inches='tight'; annotation box top-right, legend below it at 0.78; no gaping whitespace visible in rendered PNG.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption accurately describes the figure (N=80, OLS fit, OursModel coordinates); legend placed upper-right, does not overlap data; spines cleaned (top/right off).
evidence.vector_fidelity: pdf.fonttype=42 set in rcParams; script includes post-save pdffonts verification with byte-scan fallback; figure.pdf saved via fig.savefig.
evidence.file_format: All four required artifacts present: figure.pdf, figure.png (300 dpi), figure.svg, caption.tex, gen_figure.py — all non-trivial.
evidence.caption_quality: Caption states exact OLS equation (y=-0.0449x+0.621), R²=0.877, N=80, OursModel location (9.449, 0.210), and explicitly notes no data were mocked.

overall_strengths: Technically rigorous: pdf.fonttype=42, svg.fonttype='none', and post-save font verification ensure true vector output; palette is colorblind-safe with clear directional/categorical discipline.
Caption is publication-ready with specific numerical claims (slope, intercept, R², OursModel coordinates, N=80) and all required output files are present.
overall_weaknesses: Minor: legend and annotation box both occupy the upper-right quadrant; at smaller print sizes they could crowd each other slightly.
Minor: DejaVu Sans is third in the font fallback stack — on systems lacking Arial/Helvetica this non-preferred font would be used, though this is acceptable as a fallback.
